; Chapter 28: Finale

title 4271 3028
intro 7600 7605

; co-op: 1-2 human allies (AoE-style cooperative campaign)

south_north_paths ac1 ac2 ac3 ac4 ac5 ac6 ac7 ac8 ac9 ac10 ac11 ac12 ac13 ac14 ac15 ac16 ac17 ac18 ac19 ac20 ac21 ac22 ac23 ac24 ac25 ac26 ac27 ac28 ac29
south_north_paths ad1 ad2 ad3 ad4 ad5 ad6 ad7 ad8 ad9 ad10 ad11 ad12 ad13 ad14 ad15 ad16 ad17 ad18 ad19 ad20 ad21 ad22 ad23 ad24 ad25 ad26 ad27 ad28 ad29

terrain mountain ad30
high_grounds ad30

nb_meadows_by_square 80

short_sword a1

starting_squares a1 e1
starting_units raynor7 10 footman 8 archer 6 knight
starting_resources 100 100

computer_only 0 0 2 ad30 9 demo_marker_footman 6 footman 6 archer
computer_only 0 0 non_neutral a4
computer_only 0 0 non_neutral a2
computer_only 0 0 non_neutral a3
computer_only 0 0 non_neutral b30
computer_only 0 0 neutral o15 9 quest_npc 6 footman 6 archer
computer_only 0 0 h8 6 footman 6 archer
computer_only 0 0 p22 6 footman 6 archer

timer_coefficient 40

; co-op alliances at start
trigger player1 (timer 0) (alliance 1)
trigger player2 (timer 0) (alliance 1)
trigger computers (timer 0) (alliance 2)

trigger computer3 (timer 0) (if (campaign_flag ch24_garrek) (do (add_units a2 1 npc_knight_leader 6 npc_knight_escort 6 footman) (alliance 1)))
trigger player1 (timer 0) (if (campaign_flag ch24_garrek) (do (alliance 1) (allied_control computer3)))
trigger player2 (timer 0) (if (campaign_flag ch24_garrek) (do (alliance 1) (allied_control computer3)))

trigger computer4 (timer 0) (if (campaign_flag ch25_roland_allied) (do (add_units a3 8 knight) (alliance 1)))
trigger player1 (timer 0) (if (campaign_flag ch25_roland_allied) (do (alliance 1) (allied_assist computer4)))
trigger player2 (timer 0) (if (campaign_flag ch25_roland_allied) (do (alliance 1) (allied_assist computer4)))
trigger player1 (timer 0) (if (campaign_flag ch25_roland_knights) (do (add_units a3 8 knight)))
trigger player2 (timer 0) (if (campaign_flag ch25_roland_knights) (do (add_units a3 8 knight)))

trigger player1 (timer 0) (if (campaign_flag ch26_vera) (do (add_units h1 1 npc_general_vera 6 npc_knight_escort 6 footman)))
trigger player2 (timer 0) (if (campaign_flag ch26_vera) (do (add_units h1 1 npc_general_vera 6 npc_knight_escort 6 footman)))

trigger computer5 (timer 0) (if (campaign_flag ch27_marco) (do (add_units b30 8 npc_knight_escort 6 footman 6 archer) (alliance 1)))
trigger player1 (timer 0) (if (campaign_flag ch27_marco) (do (alliance 1) (allied_control computer5)))
trigger player2 (timer 0) (if (campaign_flag ch27_marco) (do (alliance 1) (allied_control computer5)))

trigger player1 (timer 0) (add_objective 1 7601)
trigger player2 (timer 0) (add_objective 1 7601)
trigger player1 (timer 0) (add_objective 2 7602)
trigger player2 (timer 0) (add_objective 2 7602)

trigger player1 (killed_target 1 demo_marker_footman enemy) (do (cut_scene 7606) (defeat))
trigger player1 (killed_target 2 demo_marker_footman enemy) (do (cut_scene 7606) (defeat))

trigger player1 (killed_target 3 demo_marker_footman enemy) (do (cut_scene 7603) (objective_complete 1))
trigger player1 (npc_has_item 3 quest_npc short_sword) (do (cut_scene 7604) (objective_complete 2))

trigger all (no_unit_left) (defeat)

trigger player1 (key_unit_killed raynor) (defeat)
trigger player2 (key_unit_killed raynor) (defeat)
